Title: Admin Loads Dashboard
Objectives: Verify a logged-in admin can open the Admin dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as an approved, active Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Admin.
2. Navigate to the Admin Dashboard.
Expected Results: Admin dashboard loads showing the counts (students, professors, admins, treasurers, pending requests).
Actual Results: Admin dashboard loads showing the counts (students, professors, admins, treasurers, pending requests).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the admin dashboard renders for an Admin. Fail if the dashboard does not load for an Admin.

Title: Unauthenticated Blocked from Admin Dashboard
Objectives: Verify an unauthenticated user cannot view the Admin dashboard.
Prerequisites: No active session (logged out).
Test Steps: 1. Without logging in, browse to the Admin Dashboard URL.
Expected Results: Redirected to the Login page.
Actual Results: Redirected to the Login page.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected to Login. Fail if an unauthenticated user can view the Admin dashboard.

Title: Non-Admin Blocked from Admin Dashboard
Objectives: Verify a non-admin role cannot view the Admin dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student, Treasurer, or Professor.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a non-admin.
2. Browse to the Admin Dashboard URL.
Expected Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard (not the admin page).
Actual Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard (not the admin page).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected away to the user's own dashboard. Fail if a non-admin can view the Admin dashboard.

Title: Deactivated Admin Cannot Log In
Objectives: Verify a deactivated admin account is blocked at login.
Prerequisites: Admin account exists but is deactivated.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to log in with the deactivated admin credentials.
Test Data: CTU ID + password of a deactivated admin
Expected Results: Error message: "Your account has been deactivated. Please contact the administrator."
Actual Results: Error message: "Your account has been deactivated. Please contact the administrator."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if login is blocked with the deactivation message. Fail if a deactivated admin can log in.

Title: Non-Admin Blocked from Admin Action
Objectives: Verify admin-only actions reject non-admin callers.
Prerequisites: Logged in as a non-admin (e.g., Professor).
Test Steps: 1. Attempt an admin-only action (e.g., approving a request) as a non-admin.
Expected Results: The action is blocked by the role guard (unauthorized / forbidden); nothing changes.
Actual Results: The action is blocked by the role guard (unauthorized / forbidden); nothing changes.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if access is denied. Fail if a non-admin can perform the admin-only action.

Title: Admin Action Without CSRF Token Rejected
Objectives: Verify admin actions require a valid anti-forgery token.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Submit a protected admin action (e.g., Update Account Status) without the anti-forgery token.
Expected Results: Request is rejected (anti-forgery validation failure).
Actual Results: Request is rejected (anti-forgery validation failure).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the request is rejected without a valid token. Fail if the action succeeds without a valid anti-forgery token.

Title: Approve Pending Account
Objectives: Verify an admin can approve a pending account and the applicant is notified.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; a pending account with an email exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open Account Requests.
2. Click Approve on a pending request.
3. Confirm the prompt.
Expected Results: Status set to Approved; approval email sent; the request row is removed and the pending count decreases.
Actual Results: Status set to Approved; approval email sent; the request row is removed and the pending count decreases.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the status becomes Approved and the email is sent. Fail if the status is not set to Approved or no email is sent.

Title: Reject and Permanently Delete Pending Account
Objectives: Verify rejecting a pending request permanently deletes the account.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; a pending request exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open Account Requests.
2. Click Reject on a pending request.
3. Confirm the deletion prompt.
Expected Results: Confirmation prompt: "Are you sure you want to reject and permanently delete this account? This cannot be undone."; on confirm the account is permanently deleted; toast: "Account rejected and deleted successfully."
Actual Results: Confirmation prompt: "Are you sure you want to reject and permanently delete this account? This cannot be undone."; on confirm the account is permanently deleted; toast: "Account rejected and deleted successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the rejected account is permanently deleted. Fail if the account remains after rejection.

Title: View Pending Account Requests
Objectives: Verify the admin can see pending student/professor requests.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Open the Account Requests panel.
Expected Results: List of pending requests with CTU ID, name, course, year, section, role, and date.
Actual Results: List of pending requests with CTU ID, name, course, year, section, role, and date.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if pending requests are listed. Fail if pending requests are not shown.

Title: Not-Enroll Deactivates / Re-enroll Reactivates
Objectives: Verify enrollment drives activation: marking a student Not Enroll deactivates the account and re-enrolling reactivates it; there is no separate manual activation toggle.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; target student is Enrolled and active.
Test Steps:
1. Edit the student, set status to Not Enroll, and save.
2. Re-enroll the student from the row menu.
Expected Results: After step 1 the student is Not Enroll and the account is deactivated (cannot log in). After step 2 the student is Enrolled and the account is reactivated (can log in). No manual Deactivate/Reactivate button is present.
Actual Results: After step 1 the student is Not Enroll and deactivated; after step 2 the student is Enrolled and reactivated.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if enrollment status correctly drives the account's active state. Fail if Not Enroll does not deactivate or re-enroll does not reactivate the account.

Title: Delete Dropped Student (Payments Preserved)
Objectives: Verify a dropped student can be deleted while their payment records are kept.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student's status is Dropped.
Test Steps:
1. Set the student's status to Dropped (if not already).
2. Open the student's record, delete the account, and confirm.
Expected Results: Account, user, and academic profile are removed; "Account deleted successfully."; the student's org-fee payments remain (user link set to null) so the treasurer income/balance is unchanged.
Actual Results: Account, user, and academic profile are removed; "Account deleted successfully."; the student's org-fee payments remain (user link set to null) so the treasurer income/balance is unchanged.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the dropped student is deleted and the payment totals are unchanged. Fail if the dropped student is not deleted or the payment totals change.

Title: Change Account Role (Valid)
Objectives: Verify the admin can change an account to a valid role.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Change an account's role to a valid role.
Expected Results: Success message: "Role changed to Treasurer successfully."
Actual Results: Success message: "Role changed to Treasurer successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the role updates. Fail if the role does not change.

Title: Change Account Role (Invalid)
Objectives: Verify an unrecognized role value is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Submit an unrecognized role string.
Expected Results: Error message: "Invalid role."
Actual Results: Error message: "Invalid role."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the invalid role is rejected. Fail if an unrecognized role value is accepted.

Title: View Student Details
Objectives: Verify the admin can fetch a student's details for editing.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student exists.
Test Steps: 1. Open a student's edit form.
Expected Results: Student's name, email, course, year level, section, and academic status are returned.
Actual Results: Student's name, email, course, year level, section, and academic status are returned.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the correct student details are returned. Fail if the wrong details or no details are returned.

Title: Edit Student
Objectives: Verify the admin can update a student's profile.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student exists.
Test Steps:
1. Edit student fields.
2. Save.
Test Data: Name / email / CTU ID / course / year / section / status
Expected Results: Success message: "Student updated successfully."; changes are persisted (including the CTU ID).
Actual Results: Success message: "Student updated successfully."; changes are persisted (including the CTU ID).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the student record is updated. Fail if the changes are not persisted.

Title: View Professor Details
Objectives: Verify the admin can fetch a professor's details.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the professor exists.
Test Steps: 1. Open a professor's edit form.
Expected Results: Professor's name, email, and CTU ID are returned.
Actual Results: Professor's name, email, and CTU ID are returned.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the correct professor details are returned. Fail if the wrong details or no details are returned.

Title: Edit Professor
Objectives: Verify the admin can update a professor's profile.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the professor exists.
Test Steps:
1. Edit professor fields.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Success message: "Professor updated successfully."; changes are persisted.
Actual Results: Success message: "Professor updated successfully."; changes are persisted.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the professor record is updated. Fail if the changes are not persisted.

Title: Dashboard Counts Accurate
Objectives: Verify dashboard statistics match the database.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Load the dashboard statistics.
Expected Results: Approved, pending, student, treasurer, professor, and admin counts match the actual records.
Actual Results: Approved, pending, student, treasurer, professor, and admin counts match the actual records.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the counts are correct. Fail if any count does not match the database.

Title: Re-enroll (No Current Term Set)
Objectives: Verify re-enrollment is blocked when no current term is configured.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; dropped student; no current term is set.
Test Steps: 1. Click Re-enroll on a dropped student.
Expected Results: Error message: "No current term is set."
Actual Results: Error message: "No current term is set."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if re-enrollment is blocked when no current term exists. Fail if re-enrollment proceeds with no current term set.

Title: Re-enroll Student (Gap Auto-Skipped)
Objectives: Verify clicking Re-enroll re-enrolls a dropped student and automatically skips every semester since their last attended term, with no manual term selection.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; student is dropped; a current term is set; the student last attended an earlier term.
Test Steps:
1. Open the student's row menu.
2. Click Re-enroll and confirm.
Expected Results: Message: "Re-enrolled. X semester(s) skipped."; student is Enrolled; the gap semesters (from the term they last attended up to the current term) are exempted automatically, with no admin input for the term.
Actual Results: Message: "Re-enrolled. X semester(s) skipped."; student is Enrolled; the gap semesters are exempted.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the student is re-enrolled and the gap semesters are auto-skipped. Fail if the student is not re-enrolled or the gap semesters are not exempted.

Title: Re-enroll (Not on Leave)
Objectives: Verify re-enrollment is blocked when the student is not on leave.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; student is currently enrolled.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to Re-enroll an enrolled student.
Expected Results: Error message: "Student is not on leave."
Actual Results: Error message: "Student is not on leave."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if re-enrollment is blocked. Fail if an enrolled student can be re-enrolled.

Title: Re-enroll (No Gap)
Objectives: Verify a dropped student whose last attended term is immediately before the current term is re-enrolled with no semesters skipped.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; dropped student; a current term is set; last attended term is the term just before the current one.
Test Steps: 1. Click Re-enroll and confirm.
Expected Results: Message: "Re-enrolled."; student is Enrolled; no exemptions are created.
Actual Results: Message: "Re-enrolled."; student is Enrolled; no exemptions are created.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the student is re-enrolled with zero semesters skipped. Fail if the student is not re-enrolled or any semester is skipped.

Title: Add School Year (Valid)
Objectives: Verify an admin can add a new school year and enrolled students advance one year level.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open Settings -> School Years.
2. Enter a new year (end = start + 1) with semester dates.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "School year added successfully."; the new year becomes Current (others Ended); enrolled students advance one year level (capped at 5).
Actual Results: Success: "School year added successfully."; the new year becomes Current (others Ended); enrolled students advance one year level (capped at 5).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the year is added and the promotion occurs. Fail if the year is not added or enrolled students do not advance.

Title: Add School Year (Invalid Year Range)
Objectives: Verify the year end must be exactly year start + 1.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a year where end is not start + 1.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Year end must be exactly year start + 1."
Actual Results: Error: "Year end must be exactly year start + 1."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if rejected. Fail if a year whose end is not exactly start + 1 is accepted.

Title: Add School Year (Duplicate)
Objectives: Verify a duplicate school year is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; 2026-2027 already exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an existing school year.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "This school year already exists."
Actual Results: Error: "This school year already exists."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate is rejected. Fail if a duplicate school year is accepted.

Title: Delete School Year (Valid)
Objectives: Verify an admin can delete a school year that has no records.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the school year has no payments, funds, or expenses.
Test Steps:
1. Delete the school year.
2. Confirm.
Expected Results: Success: "School year deleted successfully."; if it was the current year, the year-level promotion is reversed.
Actual Results: Success: "School year deleted successfully."; if it was the current year, the year-level promotion is reversed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the year is deleted. Fail if the year is not deleted.

Title: Delete School Year (Blocked by Payments)
Objectives: Verify deletion is blocked when payment records exist.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the school year has payment records.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to delete the school year.
Expected Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this school year has existing payment records. Delete the payments first."
Actual Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this school year has existing payment records. Delete the payments first."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if deletion is blocked. Fail if a school year with payment records is deleted.

Title: Delete School Year (Blocked by Funds/Expenses)
Objectives: Verify deletion is blocked when fund or expense records exist.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the school year has fund or expense records (no payments).
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to delete the school year.
Expected Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this school year has existing fund or expense records."
Actual Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this school year has existing fund or expense records."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if deletion is blocked. Fail if a school year with fund or expense records is deleted.

Title: Set Fee Amount (Valid)
Objectives: Verify an admin can set the org fee for a school year and semester.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the school year exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open Settings -> Fees.
2. Choose the year and semester, enter an amount.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Fee amount set successfully."; this fee becomes the Current one (others Ended).
Actual Results: Success: "Fee amount set successfully."; this fee becomes the Current one (others Ended).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the fee is saved as Current. Fail if the fee is not saved or not marked Current.

Title: Set Fee Amount (Zero or Negative)
Objectives: Verify a non-positive fee amount is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a fee amount of 0 or less.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Amount must be greater than zero."
Actual Results: Error: "Amount must be greater than zero."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if rejected. Fail if a zero or negative fee amount is accepted.

Title: Edit Fee Amount
Objectives: Verify an admin can edit an existing fee amount.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; a fee exists.
Test Steps:
1. Edit the fee amount.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Fee amount updated successfully."
Actual Results: Success: "Fee amount updated successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the fee amount is updated. Fail if the fee amount is not updated.

Title: Set Fee Status to Current
Objectives: Verify marking a fee as Current demotes all other fees.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; multiple fees exist.
Test Steps: 1. Mark a fee as Current.
Expected Results: Success: "Status changed to Current."; all other fees become Ended.
Actual Results: Success: "Status changed to Current."; all other fees become Ended.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if only the chosen fee is Current. Fail if any other fee remains Current.

Title: Delete Fee (Valid)
Objectives: Verify an admin can delete a fee that has no payments.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the fee has no payments.
Test Steps: 1. Delete the fee.
Expected Results: Success: "Fee record deleted successfully."; if it was Current, the next most recent fee becomes Current.
Actual Results: Success: "Fee record deleted successfully."; if it was Current, the next most recent fee becomes Current.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the fee is deleted. Fail if the fee is not deleted.

Title: Delete Fee (Blocked by Payments)
Objectives: Verify deletion is blocked when payments exist for the fee.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the fee has payments.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to delete the fee.
Expected Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this semester has existing payment records."
Actual Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this semester has existing payment records."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if deletion is blocked. Fail if a fee with payments is deleted.

Title: Add Course (Valid)
Objectives: Verify an admin can add a course.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open Settings -> Courses.
2. Enter a code and name.
3. Save.
Test Data: Code: BSIT, Name: BS Information Technology
Expected Results: Success: "Course added successfully."
Actual Results: Success: "Course added successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the course is added. Fail if the course is not added.

Title: Add Course (Missing Code)
Objectives: Verify the course code is required.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Submit Add Course with the code blank.
Expected Results: Error: "Course code is required."
Actual Results: Error: "Course code is required."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if rejected. Fail if a course with a blank code is accepted.

Title: Add Course (Duplicate)
Objectives: Verify a duplicate course code is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; BSIT already exists.
Test Steps: 1. Submit Add Course reusing an existing code.
Expected Results: Error: "That course code already exists."
Actual Results: Error: "That course code already exists."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate is rejected. Fail if a duplicate course code is accepted.

Title: Delete Course (Valid)
Objectives: Verify an admin can delete a course with no students assigned.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the course has no students assigned.
Test Steps: 1. Delete the course.
Expected Results: Success: "Course deleted successfully."
Actual Results: Success: "Course deleted successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the course is deleted. Fail if the course is not deleted.

Title: Delete Course (In Use)
Objectives: Verify deletion is blocked when students are assigned to the course.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the course has students assigned.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to delete the course.
Expected Results: Error: "Cannot delete — students are currently assigned to this course."
Actual Results: Error: "Cannot delete — students are currently assigned to this course."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if deletion is blocked. Fail if a course with assigned students is deleted.

Title: Set Student Payment Start
Objectives: Verify an admin can set when a student starts owing fees.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student and school year exist.
Test Steps:
1. Open the student's record.
2. Set the payment-start year and semester.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Payment start updated."; the student's entry year and semester are set.
Actual Results: Success: "Payment start updated."; the student's entry year and semester are set.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment start is updated. Fail if the payment start is not updated.

Title: Change Admin Password (Valid)
Objectives: Verify an admin can change their own password.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open Settings.
2. Enter the current, new, and confirm passwords.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Password changed successfully."
Actual Results: Success: "Password changed successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the password is changed. Fail if the password is not changed.

Title: Change Admin Password (Wrong Current)
Objectives: Verify the current password must be correct.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an incorrect current password with a valid new password.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Current password is incorrect."
Actual Results: Error: "Current password is incorrect."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if rejected. Fail if the change succeeds with a wrong current password.

Title: Change Admin Password (Mismatch)
Objectives: Verify the new password and confirmation must match.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Enter mismatched new and confirm passwords.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "New password and confirmation do not match."
Actual Results: Error: "New password and confirmation do not match."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if rejected. Fail if mismatched new passwords are accepted.

Title: View Student Ledger
Objectives: Verify an admin can open a student's org-fee ledger.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student exists.
Test Steps: 1. Open a student's ledger / org-fee details.
Expected Results: The student's applicable fees (per semester, with required / paid / balance / status) and full transaction history are shown.
Actual Results: The student's applicable fees (per semester, with required / paid / balance / status) and full transaction history are shown.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the ledger displays the student's fees and transactions. Fail if the ledger does not display the fees and transactions.

Title: View Org Fee Receipt
Objectives: Verify an admin can view a payment receipt.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; a payment with a receipt exists.
Test Steps: 1. Open a payment's receipt.
Expected Results: Receipt details are shown (number, date, amount, status, semester, school year, student, issuer, and signature).
Actual Results: Receipt details are shown (number, date, amount, status, semester, school year, student, issuer, and signature).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the receipt displays. Fail if the receipt does not display.

Title: Delete Student Avatar
Objectives: Verify an admin can remove a student's profile photo.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student has an avatar.
Test Steps:
1. Open the student's record.
2. Delete the photo.
Expected Results: The avatar is removed (success). (If the user does not exist: "User not found.")
Actual Results: The avatar is removed (success). (If the user does not exist: "User not found.")
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the photo is removed. Fail if the photo is not removed.

Title: Delete Enrolled Student Blocked
Objectives: Verify a currently-enrolled (not completed) student cannot be deleted.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student is Enrolled and below year level 5.
Test Steps:
1. Open an enrolled student's record.
2. Attempt to delete the account.
Expected Results: Deletion is blocked with "Only dropped or graduated students can be deleted. Set the student's status to Dropped first if they are still enrolled."; nothing is deleted.
Actual Results: Deletion is blocked with "Only dropped or graduated students can be deleted. Set the student's status to Dropped first if they are still enrolled."; nothing is deleted.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the enrolled student cannot be deleted. Fail if a currently-enrolled student can be deleted.

Title: Delete Completed (Year 5) Student
Objectives: Verify a completed student (year level 5) can be deleted without being dropped.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student's year level is 5 (completed).
Test Steps:
1. Open a completed (year 5) student's record.
2. Delete the account and confirm.
Expected Results: Account, user, and academic profile are removed; "Account deleted successfully."; the student's org-fee payments remain (user link set to null) so the treasurer income/balance is unchanged.
Actual Results: Account, user, and academic profile are removed; "Account deleted successfully."; the student's org-fee payments remain (user link set to null) so the treasurer income/balance is unchanged.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the completed student is deleted and the payment totals are unchanged. Fail if the completed student is not deleted or the payment totals change.

Title: Graduated Badge in Student List
Objectives: Verify a year-5 student is clearly indicated as graduated in the student list.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; a student has year level 5 (graduated).
Test Steps:
1. Open the Students page.
2. Locate the year-5 student in the list.
Expected Results: The student's row shows a "Graduated" badge next to the name (instead of "Enrolled"), and the year/section cell shows "Graduate".
Actual Results: The student's row shows a "Graduated" badge next to the name (instead of "Enrolled"), and the year/section cell shows "Graduate".
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the graduated student is clearly indicated. Fail if the year-5 student is not marked Graduated.

Title: Filter Students by Graduated
Objectives: Verify the year-level filter can show only graduated students.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; at least one graduated (year 5) student exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Students page.
2. In the Year Level filter, select "Graduated".
Expected Results: Only graduated (year level 5) students are listed.
Actual Results: Only graduated (year level 5) students are listed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the list shows only graduated students. Fail if non-graduated students appear in the filtered list.

Title: Set Student to Graduated (Edit)
Objectives: Verify an admin can mark a student as graduated from the edit form.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open the student's edit form.
2. In the Year Level dropdown, select "Graduated".
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success message: "Student updated successfully."; the student's year level is set to 5 and they now appear as Graduated in the list.
Actual Results: Success message: "Student updated successfully."; the student's year level is set to 5 and they now appear as Graduated in the list.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the student is set to graduated. Fail if the student is not set to year level 5 / Graduated.

Title: Update Own Avatar
Objectives: Verify the admin can change their own profile photo.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open the profile.
2. Choose a valid image (JPG/PNG/WEBP, 2MB or smaller).
Expected Results: The avatar is uploaded and shown in the profile. (A non-image is rejected with "Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP allowed." and an image over 2MB with "Image must be 2 MB or smaller.")
Actual Results: The avatar is uploaded and shown in the profile. (A non-image is rejected with "Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP allowed." and an image over 2MB with "Image must be 2 MB or smaller.")
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the avatar updates. Fail if a valid image does not update, or an invalid one is accepted.

Title: Logout
Objectives: Verify the admin can sign out.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Click Sign Out.
Expected Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; admin pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Actual Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; admin pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the session ends and the user is logged out. Fail if the session persists or admin pages stay accessible.

Title: Search Students
Objectives: Verify the admin can search the student list by name, CTU ID, or course.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Students page.
2. Type a name, CTU ID, or course in the search box.
Expected Results: The list narrows to students whose name, CTU ID, or course matches the search text.
Actual Results: The list narrows to students whose name, CTU ID, or course matches the search text.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the search filters the list correctly. Fail if the search returns non-matching students.

Title: Filter by Payment Status
Objectives: Verify the admin can filter students by payment status.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Students page.
2. Select a payment status in the filter (Paid / Partial / Unpaid).
Expected Results: Only students with that status (for either semester) are listed.
Actual Results: Only students with that status (for either semester) are listed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the list shows only the selected payment status. Fail if students with other payment statuses appear.

Title: Filter by Course
Objectives: Verify the admin can filter students by course.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Students page.
2. Select a course in the Course filter.
Expected Results: Only students in the selected course are listed.
Actual Results: Only students in the selected course are listed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the list shows only the selected course. Fail if students from other courses appear.

Title: Filter by Year Level
Objectives: Verify the admin can filter students by year level.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Students page.
2. Select a year level (1st-4th) in the filter.
Expected Results: Only students at the selected year level are listed. (The Graduated option is covered by ADM-050.)
Actual Results: Only students at the selected year level are listed. (The Graduated option is covered by ADM-050.)
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the list shows only the selected year level. Fail if students from other year levels appear.

Title: Filter by School Year
Objectives: Verify the admin can filter students by school year.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Students page.
2. Select a school year in the filter.
Expected Results: Only students for the selected school year are listed.
Actual Results: Only students for the selected school year are listed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the list shows only the selected school year. Fail if students from other school years appear.

Title: Reset Filters (Default)
Objectives: Verify the admin can reset all search/filters to default.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; some filters are applied.
Test Steps:
1. Apply a search and one or more filters.
2. Click the Default button.
Expected Results: All filters and the search are cleared and the sort returns to default; the full student list is shown.
Actual Results: All filters and the search are cleared and the sort returns to default; the full student list is shown.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the filters reset and the full list is restored. Fail if any filter or the search remains applied.

Title: Open Admin Reports Page
Objectives: Verify an admin can open the Reports page showing the 4 financial KPI cards, the Monthly Overview chart, and the All Reports list.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; payments, funds, expenses, and reports exist.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Admin.
2. Click "Reports" in the sidebar.
Expected Results: The Reports page loads with the 4 KPI cards (Remaining Balance, Total Collected, Total Expenses, Collectable Org Fee), then the Monthly Overview chart, then the All Reports list.
Actual Results: The Reports page loads with the 4 KPI cards (Remaining Balance, Total Collected, Total Expenses, Collectable Org Fee), then the Monthly Overview chart, then the All Reports list.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the Reports page renders the cards, chart, and reports list. Fail if any of these sections does not load.

Title: Reports KPI Cards Follow Monthly Overview Year
Objectives: Verify Total Collected, Total Expenses, and Collectable update with the Monthly Overview school-year dropdown while Remaining Balance stays cumulative.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; data exists across multiple school years.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Reports page.
2. Change the Monthly Overview school-year dropdown.
Expected Results: Total Collected, Total Expenses, and Collectable recompute for the selected year and the chart re-renders; Remaining Balance stays cumulative (selected year plus all prior years) and does not change with the dropdown.
Actual Results: Total Collected, Total Expenses, and Collectable recompute for the selected year and the chart re-renders; Remaining Balance stays cumulative (selected year plus all prior years) and does not change with the dropdown.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the three cards follow the dropdown and Remaining Balance stays cumulative. Fail if the cards do not follow the year or the balance changes with the dropdown.

Title: Admin Reports Page Is View-Only
Objectives: Verify the admin Reports page has no New Report button and no per-report delete or edit controls.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; at least one report exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Reports page.
2. Inspect the All Reports list and report detail.
Expected Results: There is no "New Report" button and no delete/edit control; the financial data and reports are read-only.
Actual Results: There is no "New Report" button and no delete/edit control; the financial data and reports are read-only.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if no create/edit/delete controls are present. Fail if any report create, edit, or delete control appears for the admin.

Title: View and Print Report Detail (Admin)
Objectives: Verify an admin can open a report's detail and print it.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; a report exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Reports page.
2. Click a report in the All Reports list.
3. Click Print, then Back.
Expected Results: The report detail shows its totals and included line items (funds and expenses); Print produces the printable report; Back returns to the list.
Actual Results: The report detail shows its totals and included line items (funds and expenses); Print produces the printable report; Back returns to the list.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the detail displays and Print/Back work. Fail if the detail does not display or printing fails.

Title: Reports Page Chart Filters and Default Reset
Objectives: Verify the Monthly Overview semester/month/mode filters and the Default reset work on the admin Reports page.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; financial data exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Reports page.
2. Change the semester, month, and mode filters on the Monthly Overview.
3. Click Default.
Expected Results: Changing the semester/month/mode updates the chart; clicking Default resets all Monthly Overview filters to the initial load.
Actual Results: Changing the semester/month/mode updates the chart; clicking Default resets all Monthly Overview filters to the initial load.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the chart filters and the Default reset behave correctly. Fail if a filter or the reset does not work.

Title: Edit Own Email (Valid)
Objectives: Verify a admin can change the email on their own profile to a valid, unused address.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter a valid, unused email and click Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Email updated successfully."; the new email is shown on the profile and saved to the account.
Actual Results: Success: "Email updated successfully."; the new email is shown on the profile and saved to the account.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the email is updated and persisted. Fail if a valid, unused email is not saved.

Title: Edit Own Email (Invalid Format)
Objectives: Verify a malformed email address is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter a malformed address and click Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Please enter a valid email address."; the email is unchanged. (An empty value is rejected with "Email is required.")
Actual Results: Error: "Please enter a valid email address."; the email is unchanged. (An empty value is rejected with "Email is required.")
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the malformed email is rejected and the email is unchanged. Fail if an invalid email is accepted.

Title: Edit Own Email (Already in Use)
Objectives: Verify an email already belonging to another account is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; another account already uses the target email.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter an email already used by another account and click Save.
Expected Results: Error: "That email address is already in use by another account."; the email is unchanged.
Actual Results: Error: "That email address is already in use by another account."; the email is unchanged.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate email is rejected and the email is unchanged. Fail if a duplicate email is accepted.

Title: Set Student CTU ID (No Time Limit)
Objectives: Verify the admin can set or replace a student's CTU ID at any time, including after the student's own 1-year self-service window has closed.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; the student exists (may still have a temporary CTU ID, and may be more than 1 year old).
Test Steps:
1. Open the student's edit form.
2. Enter the student's real CTU ID in the CTU ID field.
3. Save.
Expected Results: The current CTU ID is pre-filled in the form; on save, "Student updated successfully."; the new CTU ID is persisted regardless of account age (no 1-year limit applies to the admin).
Actual Results: The current CTU ID is pre-filled in the form; on save, "Student updated successfully."; the new CTU ID is persisted regardless of account age (no 1-year limit applies to the admin).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the admin can set the CTU ID with no time limit. Fail if the admin is blocked by the student's 1-year window or the change is not persisted.

Title: Set Student CTU ID (Duplicate Rejected)
Objectives: Verify a CTU ID already belonging to another account cannot be assigned to a student.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin; another account already uses the target CTU ID.
Test Steps:
1. Open the student's edit form.
2. Enter a CTU ID already used by another account.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "That CTU ID is already in use by another account."; the student's CTU ID is unchanged.
Actual Results: Error: "That CTU ID is already in use by another account."; the student's CTU ID is unchanged.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate CTU ID is rejected. Fail if a duplicate CTU ID is assigned.
